ogTitle: Barrys Reef vs Barunah Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barrys Reef and Barunah Park.
heading: Barrys Reef vs Barunah Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barrys Reef, Victoria and Barunah Park, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barrys Reef has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Barunah Park (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barrys Reef or Barunah Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barrys Reef has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Barunah Park scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barrys Reef scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Barunah Park scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barrys Reef or Barunah Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barrys Reef has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
